notes: Adds PC Link re-pair/reset pairing controls so stale Sunshine pairing state can be cleared and a fresh PIN requested.
Falls back to the system Moonlight binary when the bundled Moonlight SDL runtime has missing shared libraries.
Improves Bluetooth gamepad pairing, reconnect retries, and controller-only scan results.
Improves Public Access playlist adding, retry messages, playlist rename support, and playlist parsing fallback.
Keeps Tape Deck naming consistent across the audio module title and fallback messages.
Refreshes Settings and module list icon sizing for the CRT Station UI.
